- Mockito cannot verify toString() toString() is too often used behind of scenes (i.e. during String concatenation, in IDE debugging views). Verifying it may give inconsistent or hard to understand results. Not to mention that verifying toString() most likely hints awkward design (hard to explain in a short exception message. Trust me...) However, it is possible to stub toString(). Stubbing toString() smells a bit funny but there are rare, legitimate use cases. -
-

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
-

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();

someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

testCreateCommentWithMaximumLengthComment
+ - [ Detail ]
 0.003 s
- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

testCreateCommentWhenCommentsRepoFails
+ - [ Detail ]
 0.006 s
- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

testAllInputsNullHandled
+ - [ Detail ]
 0.004 s
- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called

testRepeatedUpdatesSameUserId
+ - [ Detail ]
 0.004 s
- Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called -
- 
org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: 

Only void methods can doNothing()!
Example of correct use of doNothing():
    doNothing().
    doThrow(new RuntimeException())
    .when(mock).someVoidMethod();
Above means:
someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called
	at com.medeiros.SPRINGProject.Controllers.UserAccountControllerUpdateInfoUserByTest.testRepeatedUpdatesSameUserId(UserAccountControllerUpdateInfoUserByTest.java:491)
